name: ADA accessibility review of floor plan
description: Check a floor plan for ADA/ANSI A117.1 accessibility compliance (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Perform an ADA accessibility review on the Holabird Academy first floor plan

expected_behavior: Reads project location from title block
Searches for state-specific accessibility amendments beyond federal ADA
Checks accessible parking (if site plan available)
ground_truth_notes: Licensed architect reviewed for ADA findings with section references

finding_recall.description: Percentage of actual ADA issues correctly flagged

code_references.description: Correct ADA/A117.1 section referenced for each finding

jurisdiction.description: State-specific amendments identified via web search
